brief_title: Upadacitinib in Rheumatoid Arthritis with Inadequate Response to csDMARDs
official_title: A Phase 3, Randomized, Double-Blind, Placebo-Controlled Study of Upadacitinib (JAK1 Inhibitor) in Patients with Active Rheumatoid Arthritis and Inadequate Response to Conventional Synthetic Disease-Modifying Antirheumatic Drugs
brief_summary: This Phase 3 study evaluates the efficacy and safety of two doses of upadacitinib versus placebo in patients with moderately to severely active rheumatoid arthritis who have had an inadequate response to conventional synthetic DMARDs. Co-primary endpoints are ACR20 response at week 12 and DAS28-CRP remission at week 24.
raw_inclusion_text:
1. Adults aged 18-75 years

2. Diagnosis of rheumatoid arthritis per 2010 ACR/EULAR classification criteria for >= 3 months

3. Active disease: >= 6 swollen joints (66 joint count) and >= 6 tender joints (68 joint count)

4. DAS28-CRP > 5.1 (high disease activity) at screening

5. Inadequate response to at least one csDMARD (methotrexate, leflunomide, sulfasalazine, or hydroxychloroquine)

6. On stable background methotrexate (10-25 mg/week) for >= 4 weeks prior to baseline

7. CRP > 0.5 mg/dL or ESR > 28 mm/hr at screening

8. Positive rheumatoid factor (RF) or anti-CCP antibody

9. Screening labs: ANC >= 1000/μL, lymphocyte count >= 500/μL, hemoglobin >= 8 g/dL, platelets >= 50,000/μL

10. eGFR >= 40 mL/min/1.73m²

11. Written informed consent

12. Chest radiograph within 3 months showing no active TB or other significant pulmonary disease
raw_exclusion_text:
1. Prior use of any JAK inhibitor

2. Prior treatment with more than one biologic DMARD (bDMARD)

3. Current or recent (within 4 weeks) use of bDMARD

4. Active or latent tuberculosis not adequately treated

5. History of herpes zoster within 12 months

6. History of lymphoproliferative disease or known malignancy within 5 years

7. History of venous thromboembolism or pulmonary embolism

8. Current liver disease or ALT/AST > 2x ULN

9. Known HIV, Hepatitis B or C infection

10. Pregnant or breastfeeding

inclusion_criteria.text: Diagnosis of rheumatoid arthritis per 2010 ACR/EULAR classification criteria for >= 3 months
Active disease: >= 6 swollen joints (66 joint count) and >= 6 tender joints (68 joint count)
Inadequate response to at least one csDMARD (methotrexate, leflunomide, sulfasalazine, or hydroxychloroquine)
On stable background methotrexate (10-25 mg/week) for >= 4 weeks prior to baseline
CRP > 0.5 mg/dL or ESR > 28 mm/hr at screening
Positive rheumatoid factor (RF) or anti-CCP antibody
Screening labs: ANC >= 1000/μL, lymphocyte count >= 500/μL, hemoglobin >= 8 g/dL, platelets >= 50,000/μL
Chest radiograph within 3 months showing no active TB or other significant pulmonary disease

exclusion_criteria.text: Prior use of any JAK inhibitor
Prior treatment with more than one biologic DMARD (bDMARD)
Current or recent (within 4 weeks) use of bDMARD
Active or latent tuberculosis not adequately treated
History of herpes zoster within 12 months
History of lymphoproliferative disease or known malignancy within 5 years
History of venous thromboembolism or pulmonary embolism
Current liver disease or ALT/AST > 2x ULN
Known HIV, Hepatitis B or C infection
